---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

Clearly describe the proposed feature or enhancement. What problem does it solve?

## Use Case

Describe the use case. Who would benefit? Why is this important?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution or approach.

## Alternative Solutions

Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Additional Context

Add any additional context or examples.

## Acceptance Criteria

What would indicate this feature is complete?
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
